user.title: Set up Frost Indicator
user.description: Point this at a weather entity and it will do the worrying for you.

data_description.weather_entity: Whichever weather integration you trust most. Met Office, OpenWeatherMap, Met.no — they all work.
data_description.frost_threshold: The temperature at which you start to worry. 0 for hard frost, 2 for courgettes.

error.weather_not_found: That weather entity seems to have wandered off. Check it's set up correctly.

abort.already_configured: You've already got a frost indicator watching this weather entity. One is plenty.
abort.no_weather: No weather integrations found. You'll need to set one up first — Met.no is free and takes about 30 seconds.

init.title: Frost Indicator Settings
init.description: Adjust the temperature threshold. Your plants' tolerance may vary.

data_description.frost_threshold: Temperature at or below which frost is expected. Hardy perennials won't care. Your tomatoes absolutely will.
